content.json:
This workbook gives an overall picture of the current Sentinel Ingestion broken down in size of ingestion per day by the Time Range you choose (7,14,30,60,90 days or custom time frame)

Additionally, you can drill down into Device related categories to see the counts coming from specific vendor processes. Since the vast majority are either Microsoft, Google, or blank (no vendor) we focus on the remaining vendors.

For questions please contact Keith Abluton(keithab@microsoft.com)

content.query:
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| project TimeGenerated, DataType, Quantity
| summarize Ingestion_GB=sum(Quantity)/1024 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), DataType

Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| project TimeGenerated, DataType, Quantity
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2), Ingestion_TB=round(sum(Quantity)/1048576,6) by DataType
| extend Total_GB = toscalar(Usage | where IsBillable==true | summarize sum(Quantity)/1024)
| extend Pct_of_Total=round(Ingestion_GB/iif(Total_GB==0.0,1.0,Total_GB)*100,1)
| project DataType, Ingestion_GB, Ingestion_TB, Pct_of_Total
| order by Ingestion_GB desc
content.title: Click a row below to drill down  ▼  (sorted by size)

content.json:
### Drilldown: **{SelectedDataType}** — Daily Spike Analysis

Showing daily ingestion vs. rolling average. SpikeStatus flags days >1.5× or >2× average. Use the **⬇ Export** button (top-right of grid) to download CSV for the cloud team.

content.query:
let avgDailyGB = toscalar(
  Usage
  | where IsBillable == true
  | where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
  | summarize DailyGB = sum(Quantity)/1024 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
  | summarize avg(DailyGB)
);
Usage
| where IsBillable == true
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_MB=round(sum(Quantity),2), Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,4), Ingestion_TB=round(sum(Quantity)/1048576,8), RecordCount=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), DataType, Solution
| extend AvgDaily_GB=round(avgDailyGB,4)
| extend Pct_of_Avg=round(Ingestion_GB / iif(avgDailyGB==0.0,1.0,avgDailyGB)*100,1)
| extend SpikeStatus=iff(Ingestion_GB > avgDailyGB*2.0,'CRITICAL SPIKE',iff(Ingestion_GB > avgDailyGB*1.5,'ELEVATED','Normal'))
| project TimeGenerated, DataType, Solution, Ingestion_MB, Ingestion_GB, Ingestion_TB, AvgDaily_GB, Pct_of_Avg, SpikeStatus, RecordCount
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Daily Spike Detail — {SelectedDataType} (export CSV → cloud team)

content.query:
Usage
| project TimeGenerated, DataType, Quantity
| where DataType in ('DeviceEvents','DeviceFileEvents','DeviceNetworkEvents','DeviceProcessEvents','DeviceImageLoadEvents','DeviceLogonEvents','DeviceNetworkInfo','DeviceRegistryEvents')
| summarize Ingestion_GB=sum(Quantity)/1024 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), DataType

Usage
| where DataType in ('DeviceEvents','DeviceFileEvents','DeviceNetworkEvents','DeviceProcessEvents','DeviceImageLoadEvents','DeviceLogonEvents','DeviceNetworkInfo','DeviceRegistryEvents')
| summarize Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,2), Ingestion_TB=round(sum(Quantity)/1048576,6) by DataType
| extend Total_GB = toscalar(Usage | where DataType in ('DeviceEvents','DeviceFileEvents','DeviceNetworkEvents','DeviceProcessEvents','DeviceImageLoadEvents','DeviceLogonEvents','DeviceNetworkInfo','DeviceRegistryEvents') | summarize sum(Quantity)/1024)
| extend Pct_of_Total=round(Ingestion_GB/iif(Total_GB==0.0,1.0,Total_GB)*100,1)
| project DataType, Ingestion_GB, Ingestion_TB, Pct_of_Total
| order by Ingestion_GB desc
content.title: Click a row to drill down  ▼

content.json:
### Drilldown: **{SelectedDataType}** — Daily Ingestion

Use **⬇ Export** to download CSV for the cloud team.

content.query:
Usage
| where DataType == '{SelectedDataType}'
| summarize Ingestion_MB=round(sum(Quantity),2), Ingestion_GB=round(sum(Quantity)/1024,4), RecordCount=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), DataType, Solution
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Detail: {SelectedDataType} — Daily Ingestion Breakdown

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Microsoft'
    and InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Google'
    and isnotempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)
| summarize EventCount=count() by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)

DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Microsoft'
    and InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Google'
    and isnotempty(InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)
| summarize EventCount=count() by InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Click a vendor row to drill down  ▼

content.json:
### Drilldown: **{SelectedVendor}** — DeviceFileEvents Events

Use **⬇ Export** button to download as CSV for the cloud team.

content.query:
DeviceFileEvents
| where InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName == '{SelectedVendor}'
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, FolderPath, ActionType, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName, InitiatingProcessVersionInfoProductName, InitiatingProcessVersionInfoFileVersion, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessAccountDomain, SHA256
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Detail: {SelectedVendor} — DeviceFileEvents

    and InitiatingProcessVersionInfoCompanyName !startswith 'Google'
